            let initialCount = 0;
            let iFramesLoaded = false;
            let chatLoaded = false;
            // Count how many of the three consents are true
            function countConsents() {
                let c = Osano.cm;
                let count = 0;
                if (c.analytics) count++;
                if (c.marketing) count++;
                if (c.personalization) count++;
                return count;
            }

            //Wait for document to render or chat/iframes fire too early on implied consent
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                // Run once Osano finishes initializing
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function() {
                    initialCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                });

                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-consent-saved', function() {
                    const newCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                    // If any consent is removed, refresh page
                    if (newCount < initialCount) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {initialCount = newCount;}
                });

                const showCookiePreferences = document.getElementsByClassName('show-cookie-preferences');
                const link = document.getElementById('osano_drawer');
                if (!link) return;
                // Ensure CMP is ready
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function () {
                    link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (Osano.cm.drawerOpen) {
                            Osano.cm.hideDrawer();
                        } else {
                            // Most installs: no args; some docs show a token—fallback if needed.
                            try { Osano.cm.showDrawer(); }
                            catch { Osano.cm.showDrawer('osano-cm-dom-info-dialog-open'); }
                        }
                    });
                });
                // Hook to drawer
                for (i=0;i<showCookiePreferences.length;i++) {
                    showCookiePreferences.item(i).addEventListener('click', function () {
                        Osano.cm.showDrawer();
                    });
                }
            });
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [E N D]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            function loadNiceChat() {
                            }
            function loadIframeEmbeds() {
                if (!iFramesLoaded) {
                    const embeddedIframes = document.querySelectorAll('.acadia_iframe_inner, .acadia_video_inner');
                    for (i=0;i<embeddedIframes.length;i++) {
                        const embeddedIframe = embeddedIframes.item(i);
                        embeddedIframe.innerHTML = '';
                        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                        iframe.setAttribute('src', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-src'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('class', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-class'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('data-cookie-consent', 'yes');
                        iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
                        iframe.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
                        embeddedIframe.appendChild(iframe);
                    }
                    iFramesLoaded = true;
                }
            }

Page not found | Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 Skip to Content 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 Successful Treatment Results 

 Testimonials 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

To request medical records: CALL (615) 861-6000 x 5 or

 Email Your Request 

 
 
 
 

 
 Page Not Found 

The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Please head back to the homepage and start from there, or try a search.

 

 
 We help each woman and adolescent girl rediscover and harness her strengths in five core aspects of the self: 

 
 
 

 

 

 “ Timberline Knolls’ PHP program has given me my life back. Stepping down to PHP with supportive living from Residential care was a huge help in allowing me to re-acclimate back into day-to-day life and responsibilities and prepared me for ultimate success in living independently when returning home. I was treated with love, respect, and care while I relearned how to be an adult in recovery. I owe my recovery to Timberline Knolls PHP. The staff, community, and supportive living made the difference between succeeding after discharge and meeting my goals, and staying stuck in my old ways and habits. I would recommend this program to anyone looking to change their life for the better.

- Sarah T ” 

 

 
 Why Choose Timberline Knolls? 

 

To view this embedded video, please edit your cookie preferences and allow Personalization cookies.

 Cookie Preferences 

 Individualized Care from Exemplary Medical and Clinical Staff 

 Experiential & Spiritual Reinvigoration and Healing for the Whole Family 

 Lifelong Friendships with a Positive Peer Group 

 Secure, Tranquil Setting in a Convenient, Central Location 

 Award Winning On-Campus School 

 
 

 

Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center is respected nationwide for its treatment of eating disorders, mental health, and addiction concerns.

 

 

 © 2026 Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center / 40 Timberline Drive, Lemont, IL 60439 / (630) 749-2493 

 

If you are unable to read or view this page please call Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center at (630) 749-2493 .

 

 

 
 Accessibility Notice 

 Privacy Practices 

 Online Privacy Policy 

 Compliance & Code of Conduct 

 Cookie Preferences 
 

 

 
 

 
 Call 24/7 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Cookie Preferences 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 Top 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Timberline Knolls is Closed

Timberline Knolls is honored to have served the community for nearly 20 years. We have now closed our campuses and are no longer accepting new patients. For additional resources, please visit  https://www.samhsa.gov/ .

        <script>
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [S T A R T]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            let initialCount = 0;
            let iFramesLoaded = false;
            let chatLoaded = false;
            // Count how many of the three consents are true
            function countConsents() {
                let c = Osano.cm;
                let count = 0;
                if (c.analytics) count++;
                if (c.marketing) count++;
                if (c.personalization) count++;
                return count;
            }

            //Wait for document to render or chat/iframes fire too early on implied consent
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                // Run once Osano finishes initializing
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function() {
                    initialCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                });

                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-consent-saved', function() {
                    const newCount = countConsents();
                    if (Osano.cm.personalization) {
                        loadIframeEmbeds();
                        loadNiceChat();
                    }
                    // If any consent is removed, refresh page
                    if (newCount < initialCount) {
                        location.reload();
                    } else {initialCount = newCount;}
                });

                const showCookiePreferences = document.getElementsByClassName('show-cookie-preferences');
                const link = document.getElementById('osano_drawer');
                if (!link) return;
                // Ensure CMP is ready
                Osano.cm.addEventListener('osano-cm-initialized', function () {
                    link.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        if (Osano.cm.drawerOpen) {
                            Osano.cm.hideDrawer();
                        } else {
                            // Most installs: no args; some docs show a token—fallback if needed.
                            try { Osano.cm.showDrawer(); }
                            catch { Osano.cm.showDrawer('osano-cm-dom-info-dialog-open'); }
                        }
                    });
                });
                // Hook to drawer
                for (i=0;i<showCookiePreferences.length;i++) {
                    showCookiePreferences.item(i).addEventListener('click', function () {
                        Osano.cm.showDrawer();
                    });
                }
            });
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            /// [E N D]  O S A N O
            /////////////////////////////////////////////
            function loadNiceChat() {
                            }
            function loadIframeEmbeds() {
                if (!iFramesLoaded) {
                    const embeddedIframes = document.querySelectorAll('.acadia_iframe_inner, .acadia_video_inner');
                    for (i=0;i<embeddedIframes.length;i++) {
                        const embeddedIframe = embeddedIframes.item(i);
                        embeddedIframe.innerHTML = '';
                        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
                        iframe.setAttribute('src', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-src'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('class', embeddedIframe.getAttribute('data-class'));
                        iframe.setAttribute('data-cookie-consent', 'yes');
                        iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
                        iframe.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
                        embeddedIframe.appendChild(iframe);
                    }
                    iFramesLoaded = true;
                }
            }
        </script>

class="vc_column vc_column_16 vc_column_container vc_col-sm-12 sp"><div class="vc_column-inner "><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="acadia_text acadia_text_1 sp"><p><span data-contrast="auto">Timberline Knolls offers </span><span data-contrast="auto">individualized and </span><span data-contrast="auto">age-appropriate services for girls and women whose lives have been impacted by <a href="/eating-disorder/">eating disorders</a>, </span><span data-contrast="auto">trauma, </span><span data-contrast="auto">substance use disorders,</span><span data-contrast="auto"> mood disorders,</span><span data-contrast="auto"> and</span><span data-contrast="auto"> other</span><span data-contrast="auto"> mental health concerns. </span><span data-contrast="auto">When you choose to participate in one of Timberline Knolls’ programs</span><span data-contrast="auto">, you </span><span data-contrast="auto">will</span><span data-contrast="auto"> benefit from </span><span data-contrast="auto">our </span><span data-contrast="auto">support within a safe and inclusive environment. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Residential Treatment</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Each woman or girl </span><span data-contrast="auto">who </span><span data-contrast="auto">receives care in</span><span data-contrast="auto"> our residential program </span><span data-contrast="auto">follows a</span><span data-contrast="auto">n individualized</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">treatment plan</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Depending on </span><span data-contrast="auto">your unique strengths, needs, and goals</span><span data-contrast="auto">, your </span><span data-contrast="auto">programming</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">may include the following elements:</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Detoxification</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Ambulatory, nonmedical detox within the residential environment</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Medication management services</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Medications administered by members of our nursing staff</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Basic medical care</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Noninvasive services to promote stability </span><span data-contrast="auto">and</span><span data-contrast="auto"> support, provided by </span><span data-contrast="auto">a </span><span data-contrast="auto">medical doctor or nurse practitioner</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Individual therapy</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Typically two sessions each week with a licensed therapist</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Group therapy</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Multiple daily groups, including </span><span data-contrast="auto">psychoeducational and process groups, all led by experienced professionals</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Family therapy</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Usually one session per week, led by a licensed therapist</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Experiential therapies</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">: Including recreational therapy, yoga, </span><span data-contrast="auto">dance/movement</span><span data-contrast="auto"> therapy, </span><span data-contrast="auto">art therapy</span><span data-contrast="auto">,</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">and supervised outings</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><i><span data-contrast="auto">Meal support</span></i><span data-contrast="auto">:</span><span data-contrast="auto"> May include dietary consultation </span><span data-contrast="auto">and </span><span data-contrast="auto">support during all meals and snack times</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Age-Appropriate </span><span data-contrast="none">Programming</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">To ensure </span><span data-contrast="auto">that </span><span data-contrast="auto">each person receives the focused, age-appropriate </span><span data-contrast="auto">programming</span><span data-contrast="auto"> that best addresses their needs</span><span data-contrast="auto">, our residential services are provided </span><span data-contrast="auto">in </span><span data-contrast="auto">six </span><span data-contrast="auto">lodges.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The lodge format provides a safe and supportive environment where women and girls can receive care alongside others within the same age group who have been experiencing similar challenges. </span><span data-contrast="auto"><a href="/about/location/">Our lodges</a> also promote the development of positive</span><span data-contrast="auto"> peer groups</span><span data-contrast="auto">,</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">which help our residents learn how to establish</span><span data-contrast="auto"> healthy </span><span data-contrast="auto">interpersonal relationships</span><span data-contrast="auto"> and </span><span data-contrast="auto">begin</span><span data-contrast="auto"> to trust others for </span><span data-contrast="auto">friendship and </span><span data-contrast="auto">support</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">T</span><span data-contrast="auto">he t</span><span data-contrast="auto">ypical length of stay in</span><span data-contrast="auto"> our</span><span data-contrast="auto"> residential </span><span data-contrast="auto">program</span><span data-contrast="auto"> for adult women is about 33 days</span><span data-contrast="auto">, while the t</span><span data-contrast="auto">ypical length of stay for adolescent girls is about 40 days. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Experienced Teams</span><span data-contrast="none"> of Professionals</span><span data-contrast="none"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Care</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">in our residential program</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">is</span><span data-contrast="auto"> provided by a multidisciplinary <a href="/admissions/">team of experts</a>. Depending on your </span><span data-contrast="auto">specific needs</span><span data-contrast="auto">, you may work with the following professionals: </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Licensed social workers (LSWs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Licensed clinical social workers (LCSWs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Master’s-level social workers (MSWs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Licensed professional counselors (LPCs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Licensed clinical professional counselors </span><span data-contrast="auto">(</span><span data-contrast="auto">LCPCs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Certified alcohol and drug counselors (CADCs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Registered dieti</span><span data-contrast="auto">t</span><span data-contrast="auto">ians (RDs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">L</span><span data-contrast="auto">icensed dieti</span><span data-contrast="auto">t</span><span data-contrast="auto">ian nutritionist</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-contrast="auto"> (LDNs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Registered nurses (RNs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Licensed practical nurses (LPNs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Behavioral health associates (BHAs)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Medical doctor</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Psychiatrist</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Christian therapist</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Art therapist</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Dance/movement therapist</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Yoga therapist</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Throughout your time </span><span data-contrast="auto">in our residential program</span><span data-contrast="auto">, you’ll be encouraged to work in active collaboration with the members of your treatment team and empowered to advocate on your own behalf </span><span data-contrast="auto">so </span><span data-contrast="auto">that </span><span data-contrast="auto">you can</span><span data-contrast="auto"> take ownership of your recovery.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Partial Hospitalization Program </span><span data-contrast="none">(PHP)</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">In addition to residential </span><span data-contrast="auto">programming</span><span data-contrast="auto">, we also offer a partial hospitalization program (PHP) for adult women</span><span data-contrast="auto"> that includes on-campus housing options.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You may</span><span data-contrast="auto"> step down to our PHP after completing </span><span data-contrast="auto">the </span><span data-contrast="auto">residential </span><span data-contrast="auto">program</span><span data-contrast="auto">, or you may enter treatment directly at the PHP level. </span><span data-contrast="auto">In </span><span data-contrast="auto">PHP, you</span><span data-contrast="auto"> have</span><span data-contrast="auto"> the option of taking part in </span><span data-contrast="auto">programming </span><span data-contrast="auto">five days per week or seven days per week. </span><span data-contrast="auto">The specific program details as they apply to each woman</span><span data-contrast="auto">’s</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">care are </span><span data-contrast="auto">made on an individual basis</span><span data-contrast="auto"> according to what’s best for </span><span data-contrast="auto">her.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">PHP </span><span data-contrast="auto">consists of</span><span data-contrast="auto"> daylong programming that</span><span data-contrast="auto"> can</span><span data-contrast="auto"> include the following elements of care:</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Basic medical care: Available as needed</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559685":360,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Medication management: Including weekly meeting with psychiatrist</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559685":360,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Group therapy: Multiple sessions during each day</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559685":360,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Individual therapy: Two sessions per week</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559685":360,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Family therapy: Usually one session per week</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559685":360,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Experiential therapy: Varies depending on need</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559685":360,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">T</span><span data-contrast="auto">he t</span><span data-contrast="auto">ypical length of stay in </span><span data-contrast="auto">our </span><span data-contrast="auto">partial hospitalization program</span><span data-contrast="auto"> is two to three weeks.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">TK Academy</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">To ensure that adolescent girls </span><span data-contrast="auto">can make appropriate academic progress</span><span data-contrast="auto"> during their time in our residential program, </span><span data-contrast="auto">our on-site TK Academy provides educational support services.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">TK Academy is staffed by certified teachers who are specialists in English, math, science, and social studies. Our teachers have experience working with students of all learning levels from middle school through high school</span><span data-contrast="auto">. These compassionate professionals are</span><span data-contrast="auto"> prepared to help young people who have been experiencing concerns such as school anxiety, school refusal, disorganization, and perfectionism.</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Students remain enrolled in their home school districts while they’re in our residential program. The TK Academy staff </span><span data-contrast="auto">collaborates with representatives from these districts, </span><span data-contrast="auto">students’ </span><span data-contrast="auto">parents </span><span data-contrast="auto">or</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-contrast="auto">guardians</span><span data-contrast="auto">,</span><span data-contrast="auto"> and our therapeutic </span><span data-contrast="auto">teams </span><span data-contrast="auto">to ensure that each girl receives superior, personalized educational service</span><span data-contrast="auto">s</span><span data-contrast="auto"> in a manner that reflects and supports </span><span data-contrast="auto">her</span><span data-contrast="auto"> continued </span><span data-contrast="auto">recovery</span><span data-contrast="auto">. </span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<h2 aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="none">Alumn</span><span data-contrast="none">ae </span><span data-contrast="none">Services</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559738":40,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></h2>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Each woman</span><span data-contrast="auto"> or girl</span><span data-contrast="auto"> who completes </span><span data-contrast="auto">programming </span><span data-contrast="auto">at Timberline Knolls receives a detailed discharge plan to guide her continued progress. She also becomes eligible to participate in our vibrant alumn</span><span data-contrast="auto">ae</span><span data-contrast="auto"> program. Alumn</span><span data-contrast="auto">ae</span><span data-contrast="auto"> services include:</span><span data-ccp-props="{"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">One year of free aftercare support</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Annual alumnae retreat</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Monthly alumnae night</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Private Facebook page</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">Supportive connections with our nationwide network of TK alumnae</span><span data-ccp-props="{"134233279":true,"201341983":0,"335559739":0,"335559740":240}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Prior to your discharge, our alumnae coordinator will introduce you to the many benefits that are available to you through this program.</span></p>

					function setAlertCookie(alertID, interval) {
						var expires = new Date();
						switch(interval) {
							case "always": expires.setTime(expires.getTime() - 1); break;
							case "day": expires.setTime(expires.getTime() + 1*24*60*60*1000); break;
							case "week": expires.setTime(expires.getTime() + 7*24*60*60*1000); break;
							case "month": expires.setTime(expires.getTime() + 30*24*60*60*1000); break;
							default: expires.setTime(expires.getTime() + 100*365*24*60*60*1000); break;
						}
						expires = Date.parse(expires.toUTCString());
						var cookieString = alertID+"="+(interval == "always" ? "" : expires)+"; "+(jQuery("#"+alertID).data("interval") == "session" ? "" : "expires="+expires+"; ")+"path=/";

Treatment Program for Females | Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 Skip to Content 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Menu 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 Successful Treatment Results 

 Testimonials 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

To request medical records: CALL (615) 861-6000 x 5 or

 Email Your Request 

 
 
 
 

 
 Treatment Programs for Women & Girls 

 Timberline Knolls offers  individualized and  age-appropriate services for girls and women whose lives have been impacted by eating disorders ,  trauma,  substance use disorders,  mood disorders,  and  other  mental health concerns.  When you choose to participate in one of Timberline Knolls’ programs , you  will  benefit from  our  support within a safe and inclusive environment.    

 Residential Treatment   

 Each woman or girl  who  receives care in  our residential program  follows a n individualized   treatment plan .   

 Depending on  your unique strengths, needs, and goals , your  programming   may include the following elements:   

 

 Detoxification : Ambulatory, nonmedical detox within the residential environment   

 Medication management services : Medications administered by members of our nursing staff   

 Basic medical care : Noninvasive services to promote stability  and  support, provided by  a  medical doctor or nurse practitioner   

 Individual therapy : Typically two sessions each week with a licensed therapist   

 Group therapy : Multiple daily groups, including  psychoeducational and process groups, all led by experienced professionals   

 Family therapy : Usually one session per week, led by a licensed therapist   

 Experiential therapies : Including recreational therapy, yoga,  dance/movement  therapy,  art therapy ,   and supervised outings   

 Meal support :  May include dietary consultation  and  support during all meals and snack times   

 

 Age-Appropriate  Programming   

 To ensure  that  each person receives the focused, age-appropriate  programming  that best addresses their needs , our residential services are provided  in  six  lodges.     

 The lodge format provides a safe and supportive environment where women and girls can receive care alongside others within the same age group who have been experiencing similar challenges.  Our lodges also promote the development of positive  peer groups ,   which help our residents learn how to establish  healthy  interpersonal relationships  and  begin  to trust others for  friendship and  support .   

 T he t ypical length of stay in  our  residential  program for adult women is about 33 days , while the t ypical length of stay for adolescent girls is about 40 days.    

 Experienced Teams  of Professionals     

 Care   in our residential program   is  provided by a multidisciplinary team of experts . Depending on your  specific needs , you may work with the following professionals:    

 

 Licensed social workers (LSWs)   

 Licensed clinical social workers (LCSWs)   

 Master’s-level social workers (MSWs)   

 Licensed professional counselors (LPCs)   

 Licensed clinical professional counselors  ( LCPCs)   

 Certified alcohol and drug counselors (CADCs)   

 Registered dieti t ians (RDs)   

 L icensed dieti t ian nutritionist s  (LDNs)   

 Registered nurses (RNs)   

 Licensed practical nurses (LPNs)   

 Behavioral health associates (BHAs)   

 Medical doctor s   

 Psychiatrist s   

 Christian therapist s   

 Art therapist s   

 Dance/movement therapist s   

 Yoga therapist s   

 

 Throughout your time  in our residential program , you’ll be encouraged to work in active collaboration with the members of your treatment team and empowered to advocate on your own behalf  so  that  you can  take ownership of your recovery.   

 Partial Hospitalization Program  (PHP)   

 In addition to residential  programming , we also offer a partial hospitalization program (PHP) for adult women  that includes on-campus housing options.     

 You may  step down to our PHP after completing  the  residential  program , or you may enter treatment directly at the PHP level.  In  PHP, you  have  the option of taking part in  programming  five days per week or seven days per week.  The specific program details as they apply to each woman ’s   care are  made on an individual basis  according to what’s best for  her.   

 PHP  consists of  daylong programming that  can  include the following elements of care:   

 

 Basic medical care: Available as needed   

 Medication management: Including weekly meeting with psychiatrist   

 Group therapy: Multiple sessions during each day   

 Individual therapy: Two sessions per week   

 Family therapy: Usually one session per week   

 Experiential therapy: Varies depending on need   

 

 T he t ypical length of stay in  our  partial hospitalization program  is two to three weeks.   

 TK Academy   

 To ensure that adolescent girls  can make appropriate academic progress  during their time in our residential program,  our on-site TK Academy provides educational support services.   

 TK Academy is staffed by certified teachers who are specialists in English, math, science, and social studies. Our teachers have experience working with students of all learning levels from middle school through high school . These compassionate professionals are  prepared to help young people who have been experiencing concerns such as school anxiety, school refusal, disorganization, and perfectionism.   

 Students remain enrolled in their home school districts while they’re in our residential program. The TK Academy staff  collaborates with representatives from these districts,  students’  parents  or   guardians ,  and our therapeutic  teams  to ensure that each girl receives superior, personalized educational service s  in a manner that reflects and supports  her  continued  recovery .    

 Alumn ae  Services   

 Each woman  or girl  who completes  programming  at Timberline Knolls receives a detailed discharge plan to guide her continued progress. She also becomes eligible to participate in our vibrant alumn ae  program. Alumn ae  services include:   

 

 One year of free aftercare support   

 Annual alumnae retreat   

 Monthly alumnae night   

 Private Facebook page   

 Supportive connections with our nationwide network of TK alumnae   

 

 Prior to your discharge, our alumnae coordinator will introduce you to the many benefits that are available to you through this program. 

 Our Programs 

 About Us 

 

 
 We help each woman and adolescent girl rediscover and harness her strengths in five core aspects of the self: 

 
 
 

 

 

 “ I can truly say I’m not just surviving, I’m thriving. Thank you, thank you, thank you! I cannot express my gratitude enough for the staff who never gave up on me. I was hardly easy to deal with but was ALWAYS treated with respect and love. You guys are life changers and role models. My life is better because of the advice y’all have given me. ” 

– Kaitlyn

 

 
 Why Choose Timberline Knolls? 

 

To view this embedded video, please edit your cookie preferences and allow Personalization cookies.

 Cookie Preferences 

 Individualized Care from Exemplary Medical and Clinical Staff 

 Experiential & Spiritual Reinvigoration and Healing for the Whole Family 

 Lifelong Friendships with a Positive Peer Group 

 Secure, Tranquil Setting in a Convenient, Central Location 

 Award Winning On-Campus School 

 
 

 

Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center is respected nationwide for its treatment of eating disorders, mental health, and addiction concerns.

 

 

 © 2026 Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center / 40 Timberline Drive, Lemont, IL 60439 / (630) 749-2493 

 

If you are unable to read or view this page please call Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center at (630) 749-2493 .

 

 

 
 Accessibility Notice 

 Privacy Practices 

 Online Privacy Policy 

 Compliance & Code of Conduct 

 Cookie Preferences 
 

 

 
 

 
 Call 24/7 
 Menu 
 

 
 (630) 749-2493 
 
 

 

 
 
 Cookie Preferences 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 Top 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Timberline Knolls is Closed

Timberline Knolls is honored to have served the community for nearly 20 years. We have now closed our campuses and are no longer accepting new patients. For additional resources, please visit  https://www.samhsa.gov/ .

Residential & Outpatient Treatment Center for Women & Girls
Residential Program
What is residential treatment?
When you take part in residential care at Timberline Knolls, you can step away from the stresses and distractions of daily life so that you can focus your full attention on your health.
During residential treatment, you’ll live in a comfortable room on our serene , 43-acre campus.
Our residential programming features round-the-clock care and individualized services, all provided by compassionate professionals in a safe and welcoming environment.
What distinguishes Timberline Knolls from other women-only rehabs or residential treatment centers?
Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center is respected nationwide for its treatment of eating disorders, mental health, and addiction concerns.
© 2026 Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center / 40 Timberline Drive, Lemont, IL 60439 / (630) 749-2493
If you are unable to read or view this page please call Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center at (630) 749-2493 .
Learn More About TK | Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center
About Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center
I was admitted to residential treatment at Timberline Knolls in 2016 to treat my depression.
I also started to unpack my relationship with my father, with my father and our family therapist; a process that I prepared for in residential.

Residential treatment at Timberline Knolls and continuing with partial hospitalization ensured that I could keep building on my recovery, namely in my relationships with spirituality, with new people, and with myself.
Admissions Information & What To Expect | Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment Center
In general, our residential programming may be ideal for you if you meet the following criteria:
If you are an adult age 18 or older who do es not need residential care, we also offer a partial hospitalization program (PHP) with on-campus housing options .

When you first get to our facility for residential treatment , you’ll have a brief session with one of our clinicians, you’ll sign some paperwork, and you’ll complete a medical assessment with a member of our nursing staff.

Timberline Knolls will also inform you of our full continuum of care available – from residential to PHP (partial hospitalization program) and IOP (Intensive Outpatient Program), with supportive housing in nearby Orland Park, IL.
“ The transition into PHP from Residential was the most scary but wonderful thing that happened to me during my TK experience.
Treatment Program for Females | Timberline Knolls Residential Treatment
Residential Treatment
Each woman or girl who receives care in our residential program follows a n individualized treatment plan .
Detoxification : Ambulatory, nonmedical detox within the residential environment
To ensure that each person receives the focused, age-appropriate programming that best addresses their needs , our residential services are provided in six lodges.
T he t ypical length of stay in our residential program for adult women is about 33 days , while the t ypical length of stay for adolescent girls is about 40 days.
Care in our residential program is provided by a multidisciplinary team of experts .

Throughout your time in our residential program , you’ll be encouraged to work in active collaboration with the members of your treatment team and empowered to advocate on your own behalf so that you can take ownership of your recovery.
In addition to residential programming , we also offer a partial hospitalization program (PHP) for adult women that includes on-campus housing options.
You may step down to our PHP after completing the residential program , or you may enter treatment directly at the PHP level.
To ensure that adolescent girls can make appropriate academic progress during their time in our residential program, our on-site TK Academy provides educational support services.
Students remain enrolled in their home school districts while they’re in our residential program.
